source_confidence: A for read-only API fetch; B/C/D per row for mapping confidence
limitations: Meta API read-only /ads returned only 1 link_url row; most current ads expose instagram_permalink_url and generic url_tags only.
campaign_alias=meta_biocom_광고별칭 is not a unique alias and must not be used alone for campaign mapping.

Dynamic macros in url_tags are intended to resolve at click time, but observed ledger rows can still contain literal {{campaign.id}}; growth team must confirm click-preview or actual URL where needed.
